text: - f. Limitation. The insurance requirements described in this Exhibit exist for the sole and  exclusive  benefit  and  protection  of  Owner  and  the  Enrolled  Parties.    The required insurance described in this Exhibit are not intended to benefit any other parties  including,  without  limitation,  parties  not  included  in  the  OCIP  Policies, Owner is not responsible for enforcing any term of this Exhibit for the benefit of any party not insured by the OCIP Policies.
